message:
feat(convoy): add ownership and merge strategy display to status/list

Show owned flag, lifecycle (system-managed/caller-managed), and merge
strategy in gt convoy status output. Add [owned] visual marker to
gt convoy list and tree views. Include hint about gt convoy land when
all issues are complete on owned convoys. (gt-myofa.6)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
